probes.name: teams-schema-migrations-applied
probes.description: Confirms every migration this module ships has run: teams, team_members, team_trials, event_teams, plus their indexes.

probes.name: teams-member-uniqueness-index-present
probes.description: Confirms the partial unique index (tenant_id, team_id, member_type, member_id) WHERE status='active' AND deleted_at IS NULL exists on team_members. Missing this index makes the roster invariant check O(N) per team — a latency + correctness blowup.

probes.name: teams-polymorphism-registry-resolved
probes.description: Confirms the polymorphism registry (config('teams.polymorphism.member_type_registry')) resolves every declared member_type to a loadable class. Fails when Wave 3 sports fails to load its Athlete/Coach models or Wave 2b Staff fails.

probes.name: teams-member-invariant-clean
probes.description: Reads academorix.teams.member_invariant.violations counter. Any non-zero value in the last 24h is a P1 signal.

probes.name: teams-pending-registration-backlog
probes.description: Warns when > 50 teams have registration_opens_at in the past AND status != 'active' (registration should have flipped open). Indicates OpenClosePendingRegistrationsJob has stalled.

probes.name: teams-stale-in-progress-trials
probes.description: Warns when > 20 trials are stuck in status='in_progress' with ends_at + 48h past. Indicates coaches aren't completing trials + CloseExpiredTrialsJob has stalled.

probes.name: teams-reconciler-recent
probes.description: Confirms ReconcileTeamMemberActiveInvariantJob completed within the last 36h (nightly cadence + 12h slop). Stale reconciler indicates scheduler drift.

probes.name: teams-orphan-event-teams
probes.description: Counts EventTeam rows whose parent Team has status='archived' AND withdrew_at IS NULL. Should be 0 — cascade should have withdrew each participation. Wave 3 addition; harmless pre-Wave-3.

probes.name: teams-child-safety-audit-recent
probes.description: Confirms every TeamCoachChanged with is_minor_only=true in the last 7 days has a matching critical-severity audit row + safeguarding notification dispatch. Missing pair = child-safety chain broke — CRITICAL alert.
